meaning: n.羊群,(禽、畜等的)群,大量,众多v.聚结
examples: They kept a small flock of sheep.
The explosion scattered a flock of birds roosting in the trees.
What was that big dark animal coming towards his flock?
Next summer, sports enthusiasts from all over the world will flock to London for the 2012 Olympic Games.
Let students flock to the quality schools and the problems in our educational system will disappear.
